vocab.meaning: vấn đề của sự uy nghiêm/đứng đắn
vocab.example: Wearing a classic timepiece is a matter of gravitas; it lends an air of seriousness to one's presence in a boardroom.

vocab.meaning: sự mệt mỏi/chán ngán công nghệ
vocab.example: In an era of technological fatigue, looking at an analog watch provides a refreshing break from glowing smartphone screens.
Owning a mechanical watch shows that you appreciate exacting standards of engineering that digital devices simply cannot replicate.

vocab.meaning: củng cố quyết tâm (về việc quản lý thời gian)
vocab.example: Glancing at my wrist helps fortify my resolve to stay productive and avoid the rabbit hole of social media on my phone.

vocab.meaning: một sự tôn trọng/nhắc nhở nhẹ nhàng về điều gì
vocab.example: A wristwatch is a subtle nod to tradition, showing that you value heritage even in a modern, fast-paced world.

vocab.meaning: sự kết nối/nhận thức về không gian và thời gian
vocab.example: Having a permanent fixture on the wrist provides better spatial and temporal grounding than searching for a phone in a bag.

vocab.meaning: thiên hướng/sự đam mê đối với sự chính xác
vocab.example: Those with a vocation for precision often find that a high-quality watch is the only tool that truly mirrors their values.

vocab.meaning: tránh được những sự xao nhãng
vocab.example: A watch allows me to circumvent distractions like notifications and emails that inevitably pop up when I check the time on my phone.

vocab.meaning: chứng tỏ/cho thấy sự trưởng thành
vocab.example: Investing in a proper timepiece can bespeak maturity, indicating that a person is ready to take their professional life seriously.
Wearing a watch fosters a sense of chronological discipline, making it much easier to adhere to a rigorous daily itinerary.
